execution_boundary.summary: SPIFFE/SPIRE establishes workload identity evidence but does not execute governed actions.

preparation_boundary.summary: Identity can be attached to a prepared action while consequence binding remains separate.

commitment_boundary.summary: Current workload identity and attestation can inform actor standing at commitment time.

semantic_equivalence_boundary.summary: Trust-domain and workload identifiers require stable mapping into StegVerse actor semantics.

unknown_trajectory_boundary.summary: Workload identity does not classify unknown action trajectories.

authority_boundary.summary: Identity and attestation do not independently grant action authority.

evidence_freshness_boundary.summary: Short-lived credentials and attestation state require commit-time freshness checks.

reconstruction_boundary.summary: Reconstruction requires identity document, trust domain, attestation, credential lifetime, and workload context.

interoperability_path.summary: SPIFFE/SPIRE evidence enters as actor and workload identity evidence.

next_required_action: add credential-expiry and trust-domain fixture cases
